text: I am enveloped by an air of curiosity and innovation. The glass-walled room whispers of collaborative minds gathering, where ideas are projected and shaped. Stepping into the R+D space, I sense excitement—a celebration of responsive change, of learning how humans connect with technology. The vibrant colors and screens invite me to contemplate the interplay of knowledge, artifice, and wonder. In this setting, I feel inspired, slightly disoriented by the visual angles, and eager to engage with this ever-evolving dialogue between humanity and intelligence.
